---
title: "isEventMessage()"
description: "Checks whether a value is an event message."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Checks whether a value is an event message.

## Import

```ts
import { isEventMessage } from "@graphrefly/ts/messaging";
```

## Signature

```ts
function isEventMessage(value: unknown): value is EventMessage
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `value` | `unknown` | Unknown value to check or decode. |

## Returns

`true` when the value matches the expected shape.

## Example

```ts
import { isEventMessage } from "@graphrefly/ts/messaging";
```

`packages/ts/src/messaging/event-message.ts`
